Unnamed: 5:
PO Value = PO Quantity x FOB

Budget Value = Total Cost

Total SMV = SMV x Total PO Quantity

Budgeted SMV = SMV x Budget Quantity

Budget Date = Created date

Shipment Date = PO Shipment Date
